texto: I have come a long way and learnt a lot. I read this quote about a year ago: 'Happiness must not be pursued it must ensue.' It's made me realise that just being married again or something like that won't make me happy the happiness ensues from how we live our lives.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lucy Davis: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I have come a long way and learnt a lot. I read this quote about a year ago: 'Happiness must not …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que felicidade, happy, me pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de me e long.

frase_original: I have come a long way and learnt a lot. I read this quote about a year ago: 'Happiness must not be pursued it must ensue.' It's made me realise that just being married again or something like that won't make me happy the happiness ensues from how we live our lives.
